title: Fuses Mind and Machine
summary: Electronic aids implanted in your brain make you a mental powerhouse.
tiers: Tier 3: Action Processor or Machine Telepathy
Tier 6: Machine Enhancement or Mind Surge
gm_intrusions: Machines malfunction and shut down. Powerful machine intelligences can take control of lesser thinking machines. Some people don’t trust a person who isn’t fully organic.
text: Electronic aids implanted in your brain make you a mental powerhouse.
details: Electronic aids implanted in your brain make you a mental powerhouse.
